source_intake_record.raw_question_text: 悬伸桥由 $A C, ~ C D, D F$ 三部分组成，桥两边的部分各有两支座．尺寸为：$A C=D F=70 \mathrm{~m}, C D=20 \mathrm{~m}, A B=E F=50 \mathrm{~m}$ ．桥单位长度上的载荷等于 $60 \mathrm{kN} / \mathrm{m}$ ．求此载荷引起的支座 $A$ 和 $B$ 上的压力．
extraction_notes: image-related fields contain PIL object string representations rather than concrete file paths or URLs
question labels and captioned support labels appear partially inconsistent; raw text is preserved as-is
